SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2008 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO OCT-10-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD JOHN MONTGOMERY, JR. AS A PARTY DEFENDANT.
